is_citizen.label: Indian Citizenship
is_citizen.fail_message: You must be an Indian citizen to vote in Indian elections.
is_citizen.help: If you are a citizen but don't have proof, visit your nearest District Election Office.

age.label: Minimum Age
age.fail_message: You must be at least 18 years old on the qualifying date (January 1 of the year of revision of electoral roll).
age.help: You can apply for voter registration up to 3 months before turning 18.

has_voter_id.label: Voter ID (EPIC)
has_voter_id.fail_message: You don't have a Voter ID yet, but you can still register.
has_voter_id.help: Apply for Voter ID at https://voters.eci.gov.in or visit your nearest Voter Registration Center.

registration_steps: Visit the National Voter Service Portal (NVSP) at https://voters.eci.gov.in
Click on 'New Voter Registration' and select Form 6
Fill in your personal details — name, age, address, constituency
Upload a passport-size photo and address proof
Submit the form and note your reference number
Track your application status using the reference number
Once approved, collect your EPIC (Voter ID) card
